titleStmt.title: SII 11.117: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 117. (B.K. No. 202 of 1926-27). NIḌGUNDI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE INSIDE THE TEMPLE OF BASAVAṆṆA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and records the renewal of a previous grant of money made by the Four Hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra of Niḍugundi, for the entertainment (pūjā) of the Mahājanas arriving from other places. It further registers (1) the gift of 10 gadyāṇas out of the 500 gadyāṇas of the agrahāra of Niḍugundi, made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṅgaṇṇadēva who was administering the Kisukāḍu Seventy division, for the pavitrārōhaṇa of the god Svayaṁbhū Kalidēvasvāmin of the same agrahāra, and for the feeding and dakshiṇā of Brāhmaṇas who recite the religious texts (pārāyaṇa), and (2) the gift of oil-mills and money, for the benefit of the temples of Mūlasthāna-Svayaṁbhū-Kalidēvasvāmin and Bhagavatī, the village goddess (of Niḍugundi), by Suggaladēvī, the daughter of Āhavamalladēva and the younger sister of the king, who was then administering the agrahāra of Niḍugundi, in Kisukāḍu Seventy. The sanction for the latter gift was obtained by her as a paramēśvara-datti from the king while he was camping at Avagevāḍi.
The inscription is dated Śaka 998, Naḷa, Bhādrapada, amāvāsyā, Thursday, solar eclipse, which regularly corresponds to A.D. 1076, September 1, Thursday on which day there was a solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī madbhuvanai
kamalladēvara vijayarājya mutterōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrā
rkkatāraṁ saluttamire © Agrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya mahājanaṁ nālnūvvaruṁ
pūrvvasthitiyiṁ naḍeva pārikhāyada hoṁge mūṟuvare vīsavamaṁ parasthānada mahā
janada bhyāgatapūjege biṭṭaru © śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ siṁgaṇṇadēvaṁ kisa kā
ḍerppattumaṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ dāḷuttami ḻdagrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiya
śāśana maryyāde yaynūṟu gadyāṇa ponnoḷage pattu gadyāṇa ponnanalliya śrī
svayaṁbhu kavidēvasvāmidēvara pavitrārōhaṇakkaṁ pārāyaṇamāḍida brāhmaṇabhō
janakkaṁ dakṣiṇegaṁ biṭṭaru © svastyanavarataparama kalyāṇā bhyudaya sahaśraphaḷabhōga
bhāginī dvitīyalakṣmī samāne kaḷahaṁśagamana pa tyekṣapārvvati yabhinava sarasvati
śrī madāhavamalladēvaruṇuṁgi śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara taṁge śrīmat suggaladēvi
yaru kisukāḍerppattaṟa baḷiyagrahāraṁ niḍuguṁdiyaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁtara siddhiyiṁ
duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷuttamire sakavarṣa 998 neya naḷa saṁvatsarada
bhādrapadamavāsye bṛhaspativāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇanimittaṁ taḷabhōgaduṇba
ḷiya poṁgereḍuvare vīsavamaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvargge Avagevāḍiya
nelevīḍino ḷbinna paṁgeydu paramēśvara dattiyāge paḍedu mūlasthāna śrīsva
yaṁbhu kalidēvasvāmidēvargge khaṁḍasphuṭitanavakarmmadhūpadīpanivēdya
kke biṭṭarā dēvargge naṁdādīvige yaṇnege biṭṭa ghāṇa voṁdu grāmādhideyvaṁ
bhagavatige naṁdādīvige yeṇnege biṭṭa ghāṇa voṁdu © Iṁtī dharmmamaṁ svadha
rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsi prayāge Argghyatīrtthaṁ kuru
kṣētremeṁbī sthānaṁgaḷalu kōṭikavileya kōḍuvaṁ koḷaguvaṁ suvarṇna
dalkaṭṭisi vēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalamakku mi dharmma
ma nārorbba raḷidava rī puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷa lanitu kavileyuma naniba rbrā
hmaṇaru manaḷida dōṣamakku © sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvā nētā nbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrō bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ © svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭhi rvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē kṛmiḥ
Digital edition of SII 11.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
